race.description: Tab Federal Riharna Thomson Maiden Handicap
race.comment: SACRED INFERNO (1) resumes and has been desperately unlucky not to have broken through. Should come back further improved and missed a nose over this trip at her only fresh outing. Looks well placed with the handy 3kg claim. TROOPER (3) has switched from the Hawkes yard in Melbourne on a 41-day return. He's certainly good enough if presented on song and just missed here in a recent trial. Has the inside barrier and is likely to race well. SHOW RHYTHM (7) switched to the in-form Olive yard and placed second here first-up behind a dominant winner. She's sure to have come on and won't have to improve much to be in the finish. ON THE FLY (4) and PURE OCTANE (2) create interest on debut. Both have leading Sydney hoops engaged, and the betting will be key with them.
